title: PayPal PYPL 2021 Q1 Earnings Report Preview
text: PayPal reported earnings of $1.1 billion, or 92 cents per share for the three months ended March 31, significantly higher than 7 cents per share in the comparable period of 2020. On an adjusted basis, earnings nearly doubled to $1.22 per share, surpassing consensus forecast of $1.01. Revenue climbed 29% year-over-year to $6.03 billion. PayPal raised financial outlook for full year, anticipating adjusted earnings of around $4.70 on revenue of $25.75 billion.
